18_bus.dgmy
examples.content:
diagram {
    width: 600
    color: white
    title: "Bus example"
}

box Top {
    grid: 3x3
    color: blue

    box alu at (2, 1) is Alu
    box mem at (2, 3) is Memory

    arrow alu.addr_out to mem.addr_in
    arrow alu.data_out to mem.data_in
    arrow mem.data_out to alu.data_in
    arrow alu.strobe   to mem.strobe
    arrow alu.select   to mem.select
}

box Alu {
    grid: 5x5
    color: green

    port addr_out on right
    port data_out on right
    port data_in  on right
    port strobe   on right
    port select   on right

}

box Memory {
    grid: 5x5

    port addr_in  on left
    port data_in  on left
    port data_out on left
    port strobe   on left
    port select   on left
}
